source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/05_Blue/2. EMC/[CR]G1417CW_RF Test report_최종/[CR]G1417CW_RF Test report_15.407.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: FCC RF test report KES-RF240891 for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model G1417CW and derivative models under FCC Part 15.407.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents radiated restricted band and emission and antenna requirement test results for the EUT; the report states it was tested at the applicant's request and cannot be used for certification.
keyPoints: Product item is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model name G1417CW and variant model names G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Test method used is Part 15 Subpart E 15.407, with test result PASS.
The EUT was tested according to FCC Part 15.407, KDB 789033 D02 v02r01, and ANSI C63.10-2013.
Radiated restricted band and emission passed; antenna requirement passed.
Several conducted and bandwidth tests were not tested because the device is equipped with a certified module, module report No. FR740701-19AC.
The report says it cannot be used for certification.

reviewFlags.reason: Antenna Requirement evidence is internally inconsistent: the summary lists '15.203 Antenna Requirement Pass' while section 3.2 begins 'According to 15.207(a)' for antenna requirements.
The source states the report was tested only for radiated restricted band and emission at the applicant's request and cannot be used for certification.
Source metadata productSignal is Unclassified and authoritySignal is general, but the document text identifies the product, models, and FCC-related test context.
